title: NIT Warangal is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: NIT Warangal is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at NIT Warangal. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Subject Matter Expert to strengthen our Dhanbad-based team.

About NIT Warangal:
NIT Warangal is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIT Warangal!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
